gmwmx2 0.0.5
  • Reference
  • Examples
    • Data generation
    • Estimate composite stochastic processes
    • Estimate regression models with dependent errors
    • Estimate regression models with dependent errors and missing observations
    • Load and plot data from the Nevada Geodetic Laboratory
    • Estimate geodetic time series from the Nevada Geodetic Laboratory
    • Estimate a small network of GNSS station
    • Plot a large network of GNSS station

Plot a gmwmx2_fit_gnss_ts_ngl object

Source: R/gmwmx2_new.R
plot.gmwmx2_fit_gnss_ts_ngl.Rd

Plot a gmwmx2_fit_gnss_ts_ngl object

# S3 method for class 'gmwmx2_fit_gnss_ts_ngl'
plot(x, ...)

Arguments

x

A gmwmx2_fit_gnss_ts_ngl object.

...

Additional graphical parameters.

Value

No return value. Plot a gmwmx2_fit_gnss_ts_ngl object.

Examples

station_data = gmwmx2::download_station_ngl("1LSU")
# fit station with WN and AR1
fit1 <- gmwmx2_new(
  station_data,
  n_seasonal = 2,
  model = wn() + ar1(), component = "N"
)
fit1
#> GMWMX fit GNSS Times Series (Nevada Geodetic Laboratory)
#>                         Estimate Std.Error   CI.Lower   CI.Upper
#> Intercept              8.157e-01 2.272e-03  8.112e-01  8.201e-01
#> Trend                 -1.075e-06 4.762e-07 -2.008e-06 -1.415e-07
#> Sin (Annual)          -5.171e-04 2.253e-04 -9.587e-04 -7.554e-05
#> Cos (Annual)          -4.128e-03 2.264e-04 -4.572e-03 -3.684e-03
#> Sin (Semi-Annual)      1.091e-03 1.493e-04  7.985e-04  1.384e-03
#> Cos (Semi-Annual)     -4.493e-04 1.499e-04 -7.431e-04 -1.554e-04
#> Jump: MJD 52920        4.872e-04 1.369e-03 -2.196e-03  3.170e-03
#> Jump: MJD 53619       -3.065e-03 1.254e-03 -5.522e-03 -6.080e-04
#> Jump: MJD 53866       -5.649e-04 1.247e-03 -3.009e-03  1.879e-03
#> Jump: MJD 54637       -2.530e-04 2.010e-03 -4.192e-03  3.686e-03
#> Jump: MJD 54640        6.385e-03 2.011e-03  2.443e-03  1.033e-02
#> Jump: MJD 55300       -2.511e-03 9.741e-04 -4.420e-03 -6.016e-04
#> Jump: MJD 56671       -1.206e-03 1.303e-03 -3.759e-03  1.347e-03
#> Jump: MJD 56868        1.113e-03 1.296e-03 -1.428e-03  3.654e-03
#> Jump: MJD 58298        3.333e-03 1.969e-03 -5.269e-04  7.193e-03
#> Jump: MJD 58004        1.139e-03 1.483e-03 -1.768e-03  4.046e-03
#> Earthquake: MJD 58004 -7.180e-03 3.387e-03 -1.382e-02 -5.418e-04
#> 
#> Missingness model
#>   Proportion missing : 0.0585 
#>   p1                 : 0.0073 
#>   p2                 : 0.1173 
#>   p*                 : 0.9415 
#> 
#> Stochastic model
#>   Sum of 2 processes
#>   [1] White Noise
#>        Estimated parameters : sigma2 = 1.433e-06 
#>   [2] AR(1)
#>        Estimated parameters : phi = 0.9802, sigma2 = 1.353e-07 
#> 
#> Runtime (seconds)
#>   Total              : 2.4727 
plot(fit1)

# fit station with WN and PL
fit2 <- gmwmx2_new(
  station_data,
  n_seasonal = 2,
  model = wn() + pl(), component = "N"
)
fit2
#> GMWMX fit GNSS Times Series (Nevada Geodetic Laboratory)
#>                         Estimate Std.Error   CI.Lower  CI.Upper
#> Intercept              8.157e-01 5.526e-01 -2.673e-01 1.899e+00
#> Trend                 -1.075e-06 1.431e-05 -2.912e-05 2.697e-05
#> Sin (Annual)          -5.171e-04 8.308e-03 -1.680e-02 1.577e-02
#> Cos (Annual)          -4.128e-03 8.296e-03 -2.039e-02 1.213e-02
#> Sin (Semi-Annual)      1.091e-03 7.973e-03 -1.454e-02 1.672e-02
#> Cos (Semi-Annual)     -4.493e-04 7.981e-03 -1.609e-02 1.519e-02
#> Jump: MJD 52920        4.872e-04 4.522e-02 -8.815e-02 8.912e-02
#> Jump: MJD 53619       -3.065e-03 3.934e-02 -8.016e-02 7.403e-02
#> Jump: MJD 53866       -5.649e-04 3.904e-02 -7.708e-02 7.595e-02
#> Jump: MJD 54637       -2.530e-04 1.290e-01 -2.532e-01 2.527e-01
#> Jump: MJD 54640        6.385e-03 1.291e-01 -2.466e-01 2.594e-01
#> Jump: MJD 55300       -2.511e-03 2.891e-02 -5.918e-02 5.415e-02
#> Jump: MJD 56671       -1.206e-03 4.155e-02 -8.264e-02 8.023e-02
#> Jump: MJD 56868        1.113e-03 4.144e-02 -8.010e-02 8.233e-02
#> Jump: MJD 58298        3.333e-03 6.781e-02 -1.296e-01 1.362e-01
#> Jump: MJD 58004        1.139e-03 4.572e-02 -8.846e-02 9.074e-02
#> Earthquake: MJD 58004 -7.180e-03 1.130e-01 -2.286e-01 2.142e-01
#> 
#> Missingness model
#>   Proportion missing : 0.0585 
#>   p1                 : 0.0073 
#>   p2                 : 0.1173 
#>   p*                 : 0.9415 
#> 
#> Stochastic model
#>   Sum of 2 processes
#>   [1] White Noise
#>        Estimated parameters : sigma2 = 8.14e-07 
#>   [2] Stationary PowerLaw
#>        Estimated parameters : kappa =    -1, sigma2 = 9.729e-07 
#> 
#> Runtime (seconds)
#>   Total              : 1.9988 
plot(fit2)

# fit station with WN and Matern
fit3 = gmwmx2_new(
  station_data,
  n_seasonal = 2,
  model = wn() + matern(), component = "N"
)
fit3
#> GMWMX fit GNSS Times Series (Nevada Geodetic Laboratory)
#>                         Estimate Std.Error   CI.Lower   CI.Upper
#> Intercept              8.157e-01 2.393e-03  8.110e-01  8.204e-01
#> Trend                 -1.075e-06 5.067e-07 -2.068e-06 -8.166e-08
#> Sin (Annual)          -5.171e-04 2.187e-04 -9.458e-04 -8.839e-05
#> Cos (Annual)          -4.128e-03 2.203e-04 -4.560e-03 -3.696e-03
#> Sin (Semi-Annual)      1.091e-03 1.397e-04  8.174e-04  1.365e-03
#> Cos (Semi-Annual)     -4.493e-04 1.404e-04 -7.244e-04 -1.741e-04
#> Jump: MJD 52920        4.872e-04 1.410e-03 -2.276e-03  3.251e-03
#> Jump: MJD 53619       -3.065e-03 1.309e-03 -5.631e-03 -4.993e-04
#> Jump: MJD 53866       -5.649e-04 1.303e-03 -3.119e-03  1.990e-03
#> Jump: MJD 54637       -2.530e-04 2.007e-03 -4.186e-03  3.680e-03
#> Jump: MJD 54640        6.385e-03 2.008e-03  2.449e-03  1.032e-02
#> Jump: MJD 55300       -2.511e-03 1.039e-03 -4.547e-03 -4.749e-04
#> Jump: MJD 56671       -1.206e-03 1.356e-03 -3.864e-03  1.452e-03
#> Jump: MJD 56868        1.113e-03 1.349e-03 -1.530e-03  3.756e-03
#> Jump: MJD 58298        3.333e-03 2.012e-03 -6.109e-04  7.277e-03
#> Jump: MJD 58004        1.139e-03 1.571e-03 -1.941e-03  4.219e-03
#> Earthquake: MJD 58004 -7.180e-03 3.516e-03 -1.407e-02 -2.882e-04
#> 
#> Missingness model
#>   Proportion missing : 0.0585 
#>   p1                 : 0.0073 
#>   p2                 : 0.1173 
#>   p*                 : 0.9415 
#> 
#> Stochastic model
#>   Sum of 2 processes
#>   [1] White Noise
#>        Estimated parameters : sigma2 = 1.364e-06 
#>   [2] Matern
#>        Estimated parameters : sigma2 = 3.513e-06, lambda = 0.01454, alpha = 0.8918 
#> 
#> Runtime (seconds)
#>   Total              : 2.1586 
plot(fit3)
